data.title: JFrog Brings Enterprise-Grade Software Supply Chain Security to Over 1M AI Developers with New Cursor AI Coding Agent
data.description: JFrog, based in Sunnyvale, California, has announced the launch of its Cursor AI Coding Agent, which aims to provide enterprise-level software supply chain security to more than 1 million AI developers. This new offering is set to enhance the coding capabilities of developers using AI technology, ensuring a more secure software development process.

data.title: AFSP DENOUNCES SUPREME COURT DECISION ON CONVERSION THERAPY
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 31, 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court made a significant ruling in the case of Chiles v. Salazar. This case revolved around Colorado's law from 2019 that banned conversion therapy for minors. The Court voted 8-1 in favor of rejecting this law, effectively overturning the state's ban on conversion therapy.

data.title: Trust Stamp reported a 33.6% y-o-y drop in Comprehensive Operating Loss for 2025, showing growth in enrollments and user completions.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.6%, representing an increase of 0.5% from the previous month. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 2.5 million. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter. These figures indicate a concerning trend in the job market despite positive economic growth. The government has yet to announce any specific measures to address this issue.
Banzai discloses Q4 and full-year financial results for 2025.

data.title: Dynex Capital, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: GLEN ALLEN, Virginia - Dynex Capital, Inc. (NYSE: DX), a REIT specializing in high-quality mortgage assets, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 before the market’s opening. The company will also conduct a conference call and live audio webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Monday, April 20, 2026, to delve into these financial results. The webcast can be accessed on www.dynexcapital.com under the Invest section.
Iran's Mobarakeh steel plant has been hit in the US-Israel strike - Mehr.

data.title: Ryerson Announces Leadership Team Changes to Accelerate Strategic Integration of the Newly Merged Organization
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Ryerson Holding Corporation (NYSE: RYZ), a prominent industrial metals processor and distributor, revealed key leadership team changes aimed at expediting the strategic alignment following a recent merger.

data.title: Dave & Buster’s Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year End 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Dave & Buster’s Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLAY) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending February 3, 2026. Dave & Buster’s is a company that runs entertainment and dining locations.

data.title: TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Outlines Growth Initiatives
data.description: In Frederick, Maryland, TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: TOMZ) reported its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025. The company, a key player in disinfection and decontamination essentials utilizing Binary Ionization Technology® (BIT™), highlighted its strategic initiatives for long-term growth.

data.title: TRX Services Partners with Stella Point Capital to Drive Expansion and Growth
data.description: A major player in payment processing solutions, TRX Services, Inc. (TRX), recently secured an equity investment from Stella Point Capital (SPC). The transaction, finalized in March, involved an undisclosed financial amount. This strategic collaboration and funding injection aim to empower TRX to further enhance its expertise in technology-driven payment processing, exceptional underwriting and risk management skills, and top-tier customer service. TRX will leverage this partnership to bolster its operations.

data.title: SEALSQ Announces FY 2025 Audited Financial Results, Reaffirms Q1 2026 Expectations & FY 2026 Guidance, Updates on Partnerships and QS7001 Certification & Go-to-Market Execution
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to take place on April 1 at 9:00am Eastern Time in Geneva, Switzerland.

data.title: Barfresh Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: The company achieved record revenue in the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, reporting $5.4 million and $14.2 million, respectively.

data.title: authID Reports Financial and Operating Results for the Fourth Quarter 2025
data.description: On March 31, 2026, authID® (Nasdaq: AUID) announced its financial and operational performance for the Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year ending December 31, 2025. authID is a prominent company in biometric identity verification and authentication solutions. The report provided important numbers outlining the company's financial standing and activities during this period.

data.title: Nano Dimension reports financial results for Q4 and FY 2025, showcasing significant growth.
data.description: The latest statistics reveal a significant increase in the unemployment rate, rising to 7.2% in the past month. This amounts to a total of 15.6 million individuals currently unemployed. Additionally, the GDP has experienced a decrease of 2.9% in the last quarter, marking a downturn in the economy. On a positive note, the stock market has shown a 4.5% growth, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute these fluctuations to various factors, including the ongoing global pandemic and shifting market dynamics. Consequently, government officials are considering implementing new fiscal policies to stabilize the situation and stimulate economic recovery.

data.title: Workhorse Group Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Workhorse Group Inc. (NASDAQ: WKHS), a leading North American manufacturer of electric vehicles, released its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2025. This marks the Company's initial earnings announcement subsequent to finalizing its merger with Motiv Electric Trucks in December 2025. Workhorse specializes in producing electric trucks, step vans, shuttles, and buses. The report covers the period ending on December 31, 2025, showcasing their financial status post-merger.

data.title: Court halts Trump's move to cut NPR and PBS funding. Congress already pulled back some funds, impacting minimal federal support. Future budgeting at stake.
data.description: The court decision will not significantly impact the federal funding allocated to public media, as Congress had previously voted to reduce funding. However, this ruling may influence the distribution of future funding opportunities.

data.title: Fortress Biotech Reports 2025 Financial Results and Recent Corporate Highlights
data.description: The FDA in the United States has granted approval for ZYCUBO ® to treat Menkes disease. A subsidiary of Fortress, Cyprium Therapeutics, has sold its Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher (PRV) for a sum of $205 million. Additionally, Cyprium stands to earn tiered royalties and potentially achieve around $128 million in total sales milestones from Sentynl Therapeutics.
